name: Garlic Oregano Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 egg beaters® 99% Egg Substitute, or equivalent to 1 egg
1 tbsp Water, if and as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the semolina flour with the dried oregano.
2. Add the egg substitute (or one egg) and minced garlic to the flour mixture.
3. Gradually add water, stirring continuously until a dough forms.
4. Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes until smooth.
5. Shape the dough into desired pasta shapes.
6. Cook the pasta in boiling salted water according to package instructions.
7. Drain and serve with your favorite tomato sauce or as a side dish with any meat. Adjust the amount of garlic and oregano to your taste preferences.
